Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=nicotinate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N-methylnicotinate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:20241, ChEBI:CHEBI:18123, ChEBI:CHEBI:32544, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.7; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:28533213}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:20242; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:28533213};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in nicotinate detoxification in planta (PubMed:28533213). Catalyzes the conversion of nicotinate to N-methylnicotinate, which is a detoxified form of endogenous nicotinate in planta (PubMed:28533213). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:28533213}.
